headline: Does Rockwell Automation’s (ROK) New Board Voice and Steady Dividend Reveal Its Capital Priorities?
summary: Rockwell Automation recently elected AMETEK Chairman and CEO David A. Zapico to its board of directors and declared a quarterly dividend of US$1.38 per share, payable on June 10, 2026, to shareholders of record on May 18, 2026. By adding a seasoned industrial technology leader to the board while maintaining its regular dividend, Rockwell is signalling ongoing focus on governance depth and disciplined capital returns. Next, we’ll explore how Zapico’s board appointment shapes Rockwell...
